title: cyclosorus × nepalensis
intro: Cyclosorus × nepalensis is a hybrid fern plant that belongs to the family Thelypteridaceae. It is traditionally used in various cultures for its medicinal properties, which include anti-inflammatory and antioxidant effects, as well as its ability to treat fever, respiratory issues, and skin conditions. The health benefits of Cyclosorus × nepalensis include reducing inflammation, improving respiratory function, and supporting immune system function, making it a valuable natural remedy for various health conditions. In herbal preparations, the leaves of Cyclosorus × nepalensis are typically dried and used in teas, infusions, or tinctures to harness its medicinal properties.
